nasb.text: oppresses the poor and needy, commits robbery, does not restore a pledge, but lifts up his eyes to the idols and commits abomination,

esv.text: oppresses the poor and needy, commits robbery, does not restore the pledge, lifts up his eyes to the idols, commits abomination,

cnv.text: 他欺壓困苦和貧窮的人，搶奪人的物件，沒有把抵押品歸還，眼目仰望偶像，並行可憎的事；

ccb.text: 欺压贫穷困苦的人，抢夺财物，扣留债户的抵押品，祭拜偶像，犯罪作恶，
